text:

sysutils/afio

intend to start contributing those efforts into
current source. As a result, I'd like to maintain
this port.

Makefile
pkg-descr

pkg-message

Please find the svn diff, attached. Please also find
the QA log, also attached.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
